tasks.subject: Task 1: Prose follows theme tokens (dark-mode bug fix)
tasks.description:
Map @tailwindcss/typography --tw-prose-* vars to semantic --color-* tokens in dashboard/src/index.css so rendered Markdown (conversation/thinking/response/tool output) follows the active theme. Fixes dark-on-dark text. See plan §Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/index.css"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check && pnpm --dir dashboard lint", "acceptanceCriteria": [".prose rule maps all --tw-prose-* vars to var(--color-*) tokens", "no component markup changes", "type-check and lint pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Centralize theme registry and wire consumers
tasks.description:
Create dashboard/src/stores/themes.ts (THEMES registry for 4 existing themes + derived Theme/THEME_VALUES/isDarkTheme). Rewire preferences.ts (re-export Theme, data-dark via isDarkTheme), PreferencesMenu.vue (light/dark groups, scroll), CodeEditor.vue (isDark reads data-dark). See plan §Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/stores/themes.ts", "dashboard/src/stores/preferences.ts", "dashboard/src/components/PreferencesMenu.vue", "dashboard/src/ui/CodeEditor.vue"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check && pnpm --dir dashboard lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["themes.ts exports THEMES + Theme + THEME_VALUES + isDarkTheme", "preferences.ts re-exports Theme and uses isDarkTheme for data-dark", "PreferencesMenu renders light/dark groups in scroll container", "CodeEditor isDark reads data-dark attribute", "all 4 existing themes still apply", "type-check + lint pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Visual Studio themes (Light + Dark)
tasks.description:

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/index.css", "dashboard/src/stores/themes.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard type-check && pnpm --dir dashboard lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["vs-light + vs-dark CSS blocks added with full token set", "two registry entries added in correct group positions", "type-check + lint pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Live browser verification across all 17 themes
tasks.description:
USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE. Bring up full stack (infra + backend from MAIN repo :9898 + dashboard dev from worktree :5173), seed a rich request row (type=0,status=2) with Markdown + tool call, drive a visible WSLg browser through request-detail, cycle all 17 themes confirming conversation/thinking/response/inline-code/code-block/tool-output legibility, screenshot the 11 dark themes, tune off OKLCH, and run pnpm --dir dashboard build. See plan §Task 8.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/index.css", "dashboard/src/components/JsonArtifactViewer.vue"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --dir dashboard build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full stack up (infra + backend :9898 + dashboard :5173)", "seeded request row with rich Markdown + tool call renders in request-detail", "visible browser cycles all 17 themes; conversation/thinking/response/inline-code/code-block/tool-output legible in each", "screenshots captured for all 11 dark themes", "pnpm --dir dashboard build exits 0"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requiresUserSpecification": false, "gateScope": "all 17 themes"}
```
